summary: Implement M4 muster preparation and mobilized force commitments
acceptance_criteria: M4 campaign plans can request muster/preparation from existing M2/M3 manpower and M3 troop-obligation scaffolds through explicit GameCommands and auditable commitment records.
Mobilized commitments record promised, due, assembled, delayed, refused, and released quantities with stable source IDs and deterministic reason ordering.
Muster preparation has a deterministic assembly date/window and local economic or loyalty cost hooks, without implementing full morale, full rebellion, or full diplomacy.
Partial, late, or missing commitments are represented as explicit campaign reasons that later march, AI, UI, and validation tasks can consume.
No UI, battle, siege, route capacity, or postwar settlement behavior is implemented in this task.
required_tests: Property/invariant tests cover no duplicate commitment fulfillment, deterministic due ordering, valid M3 obligation references, and shared player/AI command paths.
node -e JSON parse/shape check for M4-MUSTER-PREP-COMMITMENTS-001
notes: Keep mobilization as commitments and preparation, not a full standing-army or diplomacy system.
If M3 obligation behavior is insufficient, route a narrow integration question back to systems_architect rather than duplicating M3 rules.

Explicit exclusions for M4 remain: manual node battle, complex naval warfare, full diplomacy, 3D battle, multiplayer/server, telemetry, arbitrary-code mods, and frozen product or architecture changes.
Promoted to READY after M4-CAMPAIGN-OBJECTIVES-001 entered origin/main and was CLOSED.
